name: sera-calculates
prompt: Close-up, tight on face. Brunette woman processing implications — she's Sovereignty-born, calculating what this means. Strategic mind visible in her pale eyes. Warm amber light from the LEFT side, soft shadows on right. Background: subtle geometric pattern — analytical mind at work, calculating paths. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: idris-is-not
prompt: Close-up, tight framing. Dark-haired man standing apart at door, closed off expression. He's Ascendancy-born — the crack forms. Cool blue corridor light mixing with warm amber from behind him, split lighting on his face. Dark eyes guarded. Background: vertical divide — half warm amber, half cool blue. The fracture visualized. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: torren
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired man asking about someone specific — the name matters. Controlled expression but the weight visible in dark eyes. Warm amber light from LEFT, shadows on right. Background: heavy crosshatching, dark pressure. The cost of asking. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: the-flood
prompt: Close-up. Auburn-haired woman delivering the list of names — each one costs her. Heartbreak visible beneath professional composure. Cool corridor light behind, warm room light on face. Background: downward flowing lines — names falling like weight. The flood of losses. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Maren
dialogue.text: Already on a transport. Vasquez and Chen went with him. Orin-Daal was detained.
